audit_blockers: Remote refs are not restored in this checkout (no `origin` remote configured).

status_definitions.conflicting: Branch has merge conflicts against base/integration and requires conflict resolution.
status_definitions.mergeable: Branch can be merged cleanly into the integration branch.
status_definitions.blocked: Branch cannot be merged yet due to unmet dependency, policy gate, or environment limitation.

regeneration_policy: Regenerate this file on every audit run so branch state, statuses, and metadata remain current.
